content_body:
What an amazing time we had at this beautiful cabin! So luxurious and every comfort well thought out – all our needs were taken care of. And let’s not forget to mention ALL the fun things we did – rented tubes down the Toccoa River, did some hiking, and you HAVE to rent a pontoon on Lake Blue Ridge – do it for the full day. Too much fun! Thanks so much, Gary and Lissa, for a beautiful home and a memorable time.
Troy and Elise
title: Independence Day In The North Georgia Mountains
